title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 361.400 - Director's assistant may be appointed as special deputy
text:
361.400.  Director's assistant may be appointed as special deputy. — The director in the manner prescribed in section 361.390 may appoint a deputy director or examiner as such special deputy to assist in the liquidation of any corporation in his possession.
(RSMo 1939 § 7886, A. 1949 H.B. 2084) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5292; 1919 § 11680; 1909 § 1089
